name: Whiplash
notes: Led the A.I.M. raid on ESU physics building. Defeated by the Vigilants.

name: Boomerang
notes: Co-led the A.I.M. raid on ESU. Defeated and arrested.

name: A.I.M.
notes: Targeted ESU dimensional research equipment — resonance scanners and harmonic frequency gear. Motives unclear.

name: Sam Dugan
notes: Former owner of the Silver Star gas station. Rented to Ram Pau.
